title: Class I Defense Droid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Defense Droid}}
[[File:Class1DefenseUnit-AJ14.png|thumb|right|250px|The Class 1 defense unit in comparison to a [[Human/Legends|Human]] male.]]
Designed by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kist]] and created by [[Ulban Arms/Legends|Ulban Arms]], '''Class I Defense Droids''' were created to further augment the ground forces of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. This was perhaps due to the lessons learned during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] on the effectiveness of [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|armies]]. Regardless, the Empire rejected the idea and the designs of the Class 1 defense unit were later seen within the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. They were used extensively by the [[Security Police/Legends|Espos]] and were used in their armies to subdue the [[Trianii/Legends|Trianii]], a move strikingly similar to that used by the old [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]].

The droids moved on four legs and were armed with two medium [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]; one standard and the other anti-vehicle.
